intent_allowlist: how do i do X in this app
what happens when i click X
which role is allowed to do X
where is X implemented in code
what data is written when X runs

runtime_snapshots.name: version_stamp
runtime_snapshots.purpose: branch, sha, build_time_utc for deployed instance

runtime_snapshots.name: route_map
runtime_snapshots.purpose: effective routes plus methods plus tags plus auth guard names

runtime_snapshots.name: effective_config_redacted
runtime_snapshots.purpose: effective config values with secrets removed

runtime_snapshots.name: job_status
runtime_snapshots.purpose: scheduled jobs plus last-run plus last-status plus last-error

runtime_snapshots.name: audit_vocab
runtime_snapshots.purpose: event types, resource types, action codes, UI mapping rules

sources.purpose: FastAPI entrypoint, routes, session rules, settings cache, build stamp, UI shell
App configuration defaults, ports, base_url, cron schedule, feed URLs, email settings
